summary: Plan for filling dashboard_snapshots/latest.json with real, source-backed success figures.

stages.name: Manual Public Baselines
stages.objective: Enter visible public counts with explicit source notes while API credentials are not available.
stages.nextStep: Keep x_followers as the first public baseline, then manually add only counts that can be verified from the official public profile or a clearly recorded mirror/source.

stages.name: Council Channel Signals
stages.objective: Measure voluntary Council interest and engagement from dedicated Council channels only.
stages.nextStep: Define the weekly manual export/review process for Telegram Council Official and any Council-specific Discord channels before entering baseline values.

stages.name: Low-Friction API Connectors
stages.objective: Wire platforms where a single credential can produce stable counts.
stages.nextStep: Add YOUTUBE_API_KEY first, then TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, then resolve Discord invite fetch or use DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN plus DISCORD_GUILD_ID.

stages.name: Social API Connectors
stages.objective: Replace manual public baselines with authenticated platform data.
stages.nextStep: Add X_BEARER_TOKEN for X, then configure META_ACCESS_TOKEN plus Instagram business and Facebook page identifiers.

stages.name: Ambassador And Merchant Ledgers
stages.objective: Track ambassador and merchant-network success without counting demo-only merchant profiles.
stages.nextStep: Define the ambassador signal review process and the real merchant directory or declared public-test ledger. Demo profiles stay excluded.

stages.name: Agent Ledgers
stages.objective: Measure StablesAgent usage and answer gaps from explicit agent logs or exports.
stages.nextStep: Define the StablesAgent event export schema before these metrics receive automated values.

x_followers.nextStep: Replace public mirror baseline with X API once X_BEARER_TOKEN is available.

youtube_subscribers.nextStep: Set YOUTUBE_API_KEY and run npm run dashboard:update.

youtube_recent_views.nextStep: Use YouTube API first for channel views, then refine to recent-video weekly views.

discord_members.nextStep: Retry invite count from the server or use DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN plus DISCORD_GUILD_ID.

telegram_community_members.nextStep: Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and confirm the bot can read member count for @stablescommunity.

simplex_group_support_members.nextStep: Enter the SimpleX group member count manually until an approved SimpleX export or collector exists.

telegram_council_members.nextStep: Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and confirm the bot can read member count for @StablesCouncilOfficial.

instagram_followers.nextStep: Either enter a manual public baseline with source note or configure Meta Graph API.

facebook_page_followers.nextStep: Either enter a manual public baseline with source note or configure Meta Graph API.

facebook_group_members.nextStep: Enter a manual public baseline if visible; API access may require additional Meta permissions.

tiktok_followers.nextStep: Enter a manual public baseline if visible; public collector did not find a stable count.

twitch_followers.nextStep: Enter a manual public baseline if visible; public collector did not find a stable count.

moltbook_followers.nextStep: Enter a manual public baseline if visible; public collector did not find a stable count.

merchant_directory_listings.nextStep: Define a production or declared public-test merchant directory ledger. Demo merchant profiles are excluded.

telegram_council_post_views.nextStep: Collect from dedicated Council channels only; no cookies or passive website tracking.

telegram_council_reactions.nextStep: Collect from dedicated Council channels only; no cookies or passive website tracking.

telegram_council_comments_or_replies.nextStep: Collect from dedicated Council channels only; no cookies or passive website tracking.

discord_council_thread_participants.nextStep: Collect from dedicated Council channels only; no cookies or passive website tracking.

discord_council_messages.nextStep: Collect from dedicated Council channels only; no cookies or passive website tracking.

council_questions_submitted.nextStep: Collect from dedicated Council channels only; no cookies or passive website tracking.

council_role_interest_signals.nextStep: Collect from dedicated Council channels only; no cookies or passive website tracking.
